statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); ctx=""; [ -n "$used" ] && ctx=" | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' "$used")% used"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && ctx="$ctx ($(printf '%.0f' "$remaining")% left)"; echo "${model}${ctx}"
